bulkDelete.title: Delete {subject}
bulkDelete.cascadeWarning: Each selected record is removed along with everything linked to it — the same cascade as a single delete. This cannot be undone.
cascadeDelete.nothingLinked: Nothing else is linked — it will be removed cleanly.
cascadeDelete.keepHistorySuffix: hides it instead and can be undone later.
cascadeDelete.removesRecords_one: This permanently removes {count} record and cannot be undone.
cascadeDelete.removesRecords_other: This permanently removes {count} records and cannot be undone.
documentViewer.loadFailedHint: The file may be unavailable or you may not have access.
documentViewer.noPreview: This file type cannot be previewed in the browser.
pdfPages.previewFailed: Could not preview this file — all pages will be processed.
pdfPages.title: Select pages to process
pdfPages.hint: Only selected pages are sent to the AI.
